title: Found something cool thats related to Shinji
display_title: Found something cool thats related to Shinji
wikitext:
[]: Found something cool that's related to Shinji.             Quote Post by Darius » Tue Sep 05, 2006 8:55 pm Hey, I didn't know where it was most appropriate to put this thread in...but I guess the safest was this one lol. In English class the other day, my teacher read a quote from his wall and I Really liked it instantly...it was similar to me in a way..Also...It wasn't just related to me...In my opinion (and I hope i'm not alone in this...lol) It's related to Shinji. This is the Quote: "To laugh is to risk appearing the fool to weep is to risk being called sentimental to reach out to another is to risk involvement to expose feelings is to risk showing your true feelings to place your ideas before a crowd is to risk being called naive to love is to risk not being loved in return To live is to risk dying to hope is to risk despair to try is to risk failure .......But risks must be taken, because the greatest risk in life is to risk nothing The person who risks nothing, does nothing, has nothing, is nothing, and becomes nothing. He may avoid suffering and sorrow, but he simply cannot learn and feel and change and grow and love and live. Chained by things that are certain, he is a slave he has forfieted his freedom Only the person who risks is truly free." -Nelson Mandela So thats the quote. what do you guys think?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue Sep 05, 2006 9:06 pm Wow, that's a great passage, and I think it can apply to multiple protagonists within NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by Darius » Tue Sep 05, 2006 9:41 pm I agree...but the first thing that came to my mind when I heard it was that it was similar to Shinji...I disregarded everyone else...lol But yes, it's true.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Tue Sep 05, 2006 10:02 pm That's similar to what I feel when I hear "Behind Blue Eyes" I always think of Shinji and Asuka when I hear it.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Fri Sep 08, 2006 9:49 am I envy you that you have a good teacher like that. :P All I would like to add to this wonderful qoute is this: To risk is to accept the consequences of your actions and take the responsibility for them in case you fail. People are afraid to risk anything. Because they have no idea of the consequences of their actions. And they are afraid of failing, and thus of responsibility. They have no idea because they have nothing to put an idea together with. So one may conclude: Ignorance is the nest of fear.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 26, 2006 12:44 pm I always think of Mamo-chan (from Sailormoon) when I heard "Behind Blue Eyes". ; But yeah, I think that's an excellent quote that applies to Shinji. I smiled towards the end of it because it seems to be about him dead-on.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Fri Dec 29, 2006 9:03 pm I heard that quote a couple of years ago, but it's just as true today. I think all of us can relate to that passage in one form or another. This one rings most true for me because I'm a loner and tend to shy away from most people. Nelson Mandela wrote: To reach out to another is to risk involvement

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Dec 29, 2006 10:19 pm So are a Usagi/Mamoru fan then? I can't remember, what's views with Shinji, then? Shinji/Asuka Shinji/Rei or Shinji/Kaworu??
